summary: Frontend-only testing of Canada-centric content updates for Home, Services, and About pages in both English and French. All 8 test cases passed (100%). Canadian compliance content including Treasury Board, Law 25, AIDA, Algorithmic Impact Assessment, and Commission d'accès à l'information correctly displays in both languages.
passed_tests: Home page EN displays Canadian compliance content: Treasury Board directives, Quebec's Law 25, AIDA obligations, CANADIAN COMPLIANCE, QUEBEC LAW 25, Algorithmic Impact Assessment

Services page EN displays Canadian regulatory framework content: Canadian regulatory landscape, federal Directive compliance, Law 25, CANADIAN FRAMEWORKS, QUEBEC COMPLIANCE, FEDERAL DIRECTIVES, Treasury Board, Commission d'accès à l'information, Algorithmic Impact Assessment

About page EN displays Quebec/Canada focus: MONTREAL, QUEBEC, CANADA, Canadian context, federal directives, Law 25, Canadian regulators, Treasury Board, Commission d'accès à l'information, Mila, Montreal
Language toggle (data-testid='lang-toggle') correctly switches from EN to FR
Home page FR displays French Canadian compliance content: Conseil du Trésor, Loi 25, LIAD, CONFORMITÉ CANADIENNE, LOI 25 QUÉBEC, Évaluation de l'incidence algorithmique

Services page FR displays French regulatory content: paysage réglementaire canadien, directives fédérales, Loi 25, CADRES CANADIENS, CONFORMITÉ QUÉBEC, DIRECTIVES FÉDÉRALES, Conseil du Trésor, Commission d'accès à l'information
About page FR displays French Quebec/Canada content: MONTRÉAL, QUÉBEC, CANADA, contexte canadien, directives fédérales, Loi 25, Conseil du Trésor, Mila, Montréal
Navigation between Home, Services, and About pages works correctly in both languages
context_for_next_testing_agent: Canada-centric content updates verified for Home, Services, and About pages. Key content confirmed: Treasury Board directives (EN) / Conseil du Trésor (FR), Quebec's Law 25 (EN) / Loi 25 du Québec (FR), AIDA (EN) / LIAD (FR), Algorithmic Impact Assessment (EN) / Évaluation de l'incidence algorithmique (FR), Commission d'accès à l'information (same in both), and Mila references. Language toggle works correctly. Translation files at /app/frontend/src/translations/en.js and fr.js.
design_observations: UI maintains professional appearance in both languages. French translations are comprehensive and use proper French typography. Keywords banner properly displays Canadian-specific terms. Navigation, buttons, and all interactive elements function correctly in both language modes.
